title: storage — subprocessors
description: Third-party vendors that receive or process file data on our behalf. Self-hosted deployments of any of these components move them out of the subprocessor list (they become transport, not processing) but require the deployment-specific compliance record to be updated.

subprocessors.name: Amazon Web Services (S3)
subprocessors.purpose: Object storage for file bytes + variants. Multi-region deployment.
data_processed: file bytes (encrypted at rest via SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS)
signed URL request logs (S3 access logs)
subprocessors.location: US East / US West / EU (Ireland) / EU (Frankfurt) / AP (Singapore) / AP (Sydney) — tenant-selected via `storage.eu_data_residency` feature

subprocessors.name: Google Cloud Storage (GCS)
subprocessors.purpose: Object storage. Used when tenant opts into GCP hosting.
subprocessors.when_engaged: config('storage.disks.gcs.enabled') = true AND tenant disk assignment = 'gcs'.

subprocessors.name: Microsoft Azure Blob Storage
subprocessors.when_engaged: config('storage.disks.azure.enabled') = true AND tenant disk assignment = 'azure'.

subprocessors.name: AWS CloudFront
subprocessors.purpose: Edge caching + delivery for signed URL redemptions. Cached content served from edge locations to reduce latency + S3 egress cost.

subprocessors.name: Cloudflare (R2 + CDN)
subprocessors.purpose: Alternate CDN vendor. R2 for storage (S3-compatible; tenant opts in) + Cloudflare CDN for edge delivery.

subprocessors.name: ClamAV (self-hosted)
subprocessors.purpose: Open-source AV scanning. Runs as a sidecar or on-premise appliance.
data_processed: file bytes (scanned in-memory or via streaming; not persisted by ClamAV itself)
subprocessors.location: Same infrastructure as the Stackra workers
subprocessors.legal_basis: NOT A SUBPROCESSOR when self-hosted — we control it entirely.
subprocessors.when_engaged: config('storage.antivirus.driver') = 'clamav'. Default in dev + production self-hosted deployments.

subprocessors.name: Cloudmersive Antivirus API
subprocessors.purpose: Hosted AV scanning API. Alternative when self-hosted ClamAV is not viable (e.g. serverless deployments).
data_processed: file bytes (submitted to API; retained per Cloudmersive's own retention policy)

subprocessors.name: Cloudinary
subprocessors.purpose: OPTIONAL image variant generation offload. Only engaged when the tenant opts into remote image processing (e.g. animated WebP output).

self_hosted_components: Laravel Reverb (broadcast for storage.file.variants_ready) — our infrastructure
Redis (variant queue + entitlement cache) — our infrastructure
PostgreSQL (file + variant + audit + chunked-upload tables) — our infrastructure
notes: Every tenant's chosen backend is stored in `tenants.storage_disk_assignment`. Cross-region moves require a data-migration operation + DPA update.
The AV driver choice is deployment-wide, not per-tenant. Enterprise tenants requiring hosted AV can request a deployment tier change.
